home_overview_text: Here is an overview of your learning progress, upcoming schedule, and latest results.
home_dashboard_unavailable: Dashboard data is temporarily unavailable. You can still open your tests and retry.
home_active_attempts_msg: active attempts that can be resumed right away.
home_no_active_attempts_msg: No live attempt is waiting on you right now. Use this time to review upcoming tests or recent results.
home_nothing_on_calendar: Nothing is on the calendar yet. When an instructor assigns a test, it will appear here.
home_next_assignment_auto: Your next assignment will appear here automatically.
home_no_recent_attempts_text: Your completed attempts will show up here once you start taking tests.
exams_review_readiness: Review readiness details, then open the instructions for any available test.
exams_must_complete_one_run: Attempts that must be completed in one run
exams_explicit_passing_score: Tests with an explicit passing score
exams_search_placeholder: Search by title, course, module, or type
exams_assigned_tests_appear: Your assigned tests will appear here as soon as they are published or scheduled.
exams_no_tests_match: No tests match the current search
exams_clear_search_restore: Clear the search to restore the full list of available tests.
exams_what_opens_next_text: Instructions, readiness checks, identity verification, and the monitored test flow.
exams_newest_pinned: Newest available test is pinned first.
attempts_no_attempts_yet: No attempts yet. Take a test to get started.
result_opened_from_manage_text: This result was opened from the admin test review workflow. Use the back action below to return to the same test tab.
result_awaiting_review_text: Your attempt was submitted successfully. An instructor or admin still needs to review at least one manually graded answer before the final score is published.
result_after_grading_text: Detailed answer review and final result reporting will appear after grading is complete.
result_no_proctoring_data: No proctoring data was recorded for this attempt.
result_no_alert_events: No alert events were recorded for this attempt.
result_manual_review_workflow_text: Review manually graded answers, save awarded points question by question, then finalize to publish the updated score.
result_no_answer_review: No answer review is available for this attempt.
result_invalid_link: Invalid attempt link. Return to your attempts list and try again.
result_proctoring_load_error: Proctoring summary could not be loaded. Retry to restore it.
result_details_load_error: Some result details could not be loaded. Retry to restore the full review.
result_failed_to_load: Failed to load result. Please try again.
result_report_tab_error: Unable to open the report in a new tab.
result_open_report_error: Unable to open the exam report.
result_pdf_download_error: Unable to download the PDF report.
result_enter_points_error: Enter the awarded points before saving this review.
result_review_saved_notice: Manual review points saved. Finalize the review to publish the updated score.
result_save_review_error: Unable to save manual review points.
result_review_finalized_notice: Attempt review finalized and score published.

rules_subtitle: Silakan baca dan terima aturan berikut sebelum memulai
rules_no_external_resources: Jangan menggunakan sumber daya eksternal, buku, atau catatan selama tes.
rules_no_communication: Jangan berkomunikasi dengan orang lain selama tes.
rules_face_visible: Jaga wajah Anda tetap terlihat di kamera setiap saat.
rules_no_mobile: Jangan gunakan ponsel atau perangkat elektronik lainnya.
rules_stay_fullscreen: Tetap dalam mode layar penuh selama tes.
rules_suspicious_flagged: Perilaku mencurigakan akan ditandai dan direkam.
rules_violations_termination: Pelanggaran dapat mengakibatkan penghentian tes atau pembatalan skor.
rules_invalid_link: Tautan tes tidak valid. Kembali ke daftar tes dan coba lagi.
rules_load_error: Gagal memuat aturan dan persyaratan tes. Coba lagi sebelum memulai.
rules_system_check_passed: Sesi browser ini sudah lulus pemeriksaan perangkat yang diperlukan.
rules_system_check_pending: Kembali ke pemeriksaan sistem sebelum memulai percobaan langsung.
rules_camera_helper: Kamera Anda akan merekam Anda selama tes.
rules_mic_helper: Mikrofon Anda akan dipantau untuk audio selama tes.
rules_screen_helper: Seluruh layar Anda harus dibagikan sebelum percobaan dimulai. Jika berbagi berhenti, Anda akan diminta lagi.
rules_fullscreen_helper: Tes akan berjalan dalam mode layar penuh. Keluar dari layar penuh akan ditandai.
rules_identity_helper: Verifikasi identitas diperiksa sebelum Anda memasuki percobaan.
rules_system_check_warning: Pemeriksaan sistem belum selesai di sesi browser ini. Kembali ke layar pemeriksaan sebelum memulai percobaan langsung.
rules_unavailable: Aturan tidak tersedia sampai konfigurasi tes berhasil dimuat.
rules_agree_label: Saya telah membaca dan menyetujui semua aturan tes dan menyetujui pemantauan yang dijelaskan di atas
rules_complete_system_check: Selesaikan pemeriksaan sistem di sesi browser ini sebelum memulai tes.
rules_not_ready: Aturan tes belum siap. Muat ulang aturan sebelum memulai.
rules_must_accept: Anda harus menerima aturan sebelum memulai.
rules_attempt_error: Gagal membuat atau menemukan percobaan aktif untuk tes ini.
rules_fullscreen_required: Layar penuh diperlukan sebelum tes dimulai. Silakan izinkan layar penuh dan coba lagi.

syscheck_entire_screen_error: Anda harus membagikan seluruh layar, bukan satu jendela atau tab browser.

syscheck_screen_start_error: Berbagi layar tidak dapat dimulai. Coba lagi.

syscheck_allow_camera: Silakan izinkan akses kamera dan segarkan.
syscheck_share_screen_hint: Bagikan seluruh layar Anda sekarang agar percobaan dapat dimulai tanpa permintaan izin lain.
syscheck_fullscreen_required: Layar penuh diperlukan untuk tes ini.
verify_subtitle: Ambil selfie langsung dan berikan gambar ID yang jelas
verify_identity_required_helper: Selfie dan bukti ID diperlukan sebelum peserta dapat melanjutkan.
verify_camera_required_helper: Akses kamera langsung diperlukan untuk selfie dan pengawasan Anda.
verify_camera_optional_helper: Akses kamera diperlukan untuk selfie Anda.
verify_lighting_required_helper: Pindah ke cahaya yang lebih terang jika skor tetap terlalu rendah.
verify_lighting_disabled_helper: Penolakan cahaya rendah dinonaktifkan untuk tes ini.
verify_id_typed_helper: Nomor ID yang Anda ketik akan dikirim bersama foto Anda.
verify_id_auto_helper: Jika nomor ID tidak terdeteksi otomatis, peserta dapat mengetiknya secara manual.
verify_camera_access_error: Akses kamera diperlukan untuk verifikasi identitas. Silakan izinkan akses dan muat ulang.
verify_invalid_link: Tautan tes tidak valid. Kembali ke daftar tes dan coba lagi.
verify_load_requirements_error: Gagal memuat persyaratan verifikasi tes. Silakan segarkan dan coba lagi.
verify_fullscreen_picker_warning: Membuka pemilih file browser dapat keluar dari layar penuh. Kembali ke layar penuh sebelum melanjutkan.
verify_camera_not_ready: Kamera belum siap. Silakan izinkan akses dan coba lagi.
verify_invalid_image: Silakan unggah file gambar ID yang valid.
verify_config_not_loaded: Tidak dapat memverifikasi identitas karena persyaratan tes belum dimuat.
verify_selfie_id_required: Ambil selfie langsung dan berikan foto ID Anda terlebih dahulu.
verify_return_fullscreen: Kembali ke layar penuh sebelum melanjutkan.
verify_verification_failed: Verifikasi gagal. Silakan perbaiki masalah di bawah dan coba lagi.
verify_identity_failed: Gagal memverifikasi identitas. Silakan ambil ulang foto dan coba lagi.
verify_capture_id_aria: Ambil foto ID dari kamera langsung
verify_camera_helper: Akses kamera diperlukan untuk selfie Anda. Silakan izinkan akses dan muat ulang halaman.
verify_id_manual_hint: Jika nomor ID tidak terdeteksi dari gambar, Anda dapat mengetiknya di sini.
verify_reason_mic_failed: Akses mikrofon diperlukan. Silakan izinkan akses dan coba lagi.
verify_reason_camera_failed: Akses kamera diperlukan. Silakan izinkan akses dan coba lagi.
verify_reason_fullscreen: Silakan beralih ke layar penuh untuk melanjutkan.
verify_reason_low_lighting: Foto Anda terlalu gelap. Pindah ke area yang lebih terang dan ambil ulang.
verify_reason_face_mismatch: Selfie Anda tidak cocok dengan wajah di ID Anda. Pastikan kedua foto jelas dan coba lagi.
verify_reason_id_text_missing: Kami tidak dapat membaca nomor ID Anda. Silakan ketik di kolom di bawah.
verify_reason_ocr_unavailable: Silakan ketik nomor ID Anda di kolom di bawah.
verify_reason_id_too_similar: Foto ID terlihat sama dengan selfie Anda. Silakan ambil foto kartu ID asli Anda.
verify_reason_id_looks_selfie: Silakan ambil foto kartu ID Anda, bukan wajah Anda.
verify_reason_id_not_detected: Kami tidak dapat mendeteksi kartu ID Anda. Pastikan kartu penuh terlihat dan terang.
not_found_message: Halaman yang Anda cari tidak ditemukan.
access_denied_body: Akun Anda tidak memiliki izin untuk membuka halaman ini.
surveys_no_surveys: Tidak ada survei yang tersedia saat ini.
training_modules_loaded: Modul yang dimuat di seluruh kursus
training_tests_attached: Tes yang terhubung ke modul kursus
training_partial_notice: Beberapa detail pelatihan tidak tersedia sementara. Informasi kursus ditampilkan, tetapi tautan modul atau tes mungkin tidak lengkap.
training_no_match: Tidak ada kursus yang cocok dengan pencarian saat ini.
training_clear_search_hint: Hapus pencarian untuk memulihkan kursus, modul, dan tes yang dimuat.
training_assigned_appear: Kursus pelatihan yang ditugaskan akan muncul di sini setelah dipublikasikan ke akun Anda.
training_no_modules: Tidak ada modul yang tersedia untuk kursus ini saat ini.
proctor_upload_processing: Unggahan selesai. Pemrosesan video akhir masih berjalan. Jangan tutup halaman ini.
proctor_upload_in_progress: Mengunggah rekaman pengawasan yang diperlukan sebelum pengiriman. Jangan tutup halaman ini.
proctor_screen_share_message: Tes ini mengharuskan Anda berbagi seluruh layar selama ujian. Layar Anda akan direkam dan dipantau.
proctor_no_questions: Tidak ada pertanyaan yang tersedia untuk percobaan ini.
proctor_recording_hint: Rekaman tersimpan muncul setelah kirim di Kelola Tes - Pengawasan - Video
proctor_once_submitted: Setelah dikirim, percobaan ini akan dikunci dan dikirim untuk ditinjau.

admin_manage_menu_retake: Pengaturan jeda, pengulangan, dan penjadwalan ulang
admin_manage_err_pause_duration: Durasi jeda harus berupa angka positif dalam menit.
admin_manage_err_retake_cooldown: Pendinginan pengulangan harus nol atau lebih besar.
admin_manage_err_validity_days: Hari validitas hasil harus berupa angka positif.
admin_manage_err_external_json: JSON tidak valid di atribut eksternal.
admin_manage_err_external_object: Atribut eksternal harus berupa objek JSON.
admin_manage_translation_updated: Terjemahan diperbarui. Simpan pengaturan untuk menyimpannya.
admin_manage_err_translation_lang: Pilih bahasa dan tambahkan setidaknya satu kolom terjemahan.
admin_manage_err_translation_duplicate: Terjemahan untuk bahasa ini sudah ada.
admin_manage_attachment_updated: Lampiran diperbarui. Simpan pengaturan untuk menyimpannya.
admin_manage_err_coupon_amount: Jumlah kupon harus lebih besar dari 0.
admin_manage_err_no_cert_sources: Tidak ditemukan tes lain dengan pengaturan sertifikat.
admin_manage_err_choose_cert: Pilih tes dengan konfigurasi sertifikat yang valid.
admin_manage_category_created: Kategori dibuat dan ditetapkan ke draf tes ini.
admin_wizard_detector_face_desc: Detect presence and count of faces
admin_wizard_detector_head_desc: Detect sustained head turns and posture changes
admin_wizard_req_identity_desc: Require selfie and ID checks before the learner enters the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_camera_desc: Block the journey if the camera is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_mic_desc: Block the journey if the microphone is unavailable.
admin_wizard_req_lighting_desc: Require the webcam feed to pass the minimum lighting score.
admin_wizard_req_fullscreen_desc: Require fullscreen during the active attempt.
admin_wizard_req_tab_desc: Track focus loss, tab switches, and hidden pages.
admin_wizard_req_clipboard_desc: Disable copy and paste shortcuts during the attempt.
admin_wizard_req_screen_desc: Request screen share and save a screen recording with timed snapshots for later review.
admin_wizard_pcg_identity_desc: Tune how strict the journey checks are before the learner can start.
admin_wizard_pcg_attention_desc: Control how aggressively gaze, posture, speech, and mouth movement are flagged.
admin_wizard_pcg_enforcement_desc: Define when repeated violations should escalate to an automatic submission.
admin_wizard_pcg_capture_desc: Control how often visual/audio evidence is sampled and sent for analysis.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_absence_desc: Lower is stricter. Missing faces trigger alerts sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_lighting_min_desc: Higher is stricter. Darker rooms will fail the precheck.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_id_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens selfie-to-ID matching.
admin_wizard_ctrl_face_verify_desc: Lower is stricter. Tightens ongoing face verification.
admin_wizard_ctrl_object_conf_desc: Higher is stricter. Require stronger model confidence before flagging objects.
admin_wizard_ctrl_multi_face_area_desc: Higher is stricter about ignoring tiny false-positive faces before raising a multiple-face alert.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_hard_desc: Frames darker than this trigger an immediate camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_cover_soft_desc: Dark flat frames below this luma can trigger a softer camera-covered streak.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_stddev_desc: Lower values require the frame to be flatter before it counts as softly covered.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_hard_frames_desc: How many fully blocked frames are needed before warning immediately.
admin_wizard_ctrl_cam_soft_frames_desc: How many dark flat frames are needed before warning for a covered camera.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_angle_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller gaze drift triggers alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_eye_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer frames are needed before flagging.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_yaw_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller side turns count as suspicious.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_pitch_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller up/down head motion is flagged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_head_frames_desc: Lower is stricter. Head pose changes trigger sooner.
admin_wizard_ctrl_mouth_thresh_desc: Lower is stricter. Smaller mouth motion can trigger talking alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_rms_desc: Lower is stricter. Quieter noise can trigger audio alerts.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer noisy chunks are needed before alerting.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_chunks_desc: Lower is stricter. Fewer speech-like chunks are needed before the anomaly path fires.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_rms_desc: Raise this to ignore quieter background noise when speech detection is enabled.
admin_wizard_ctrl_speech_mult_desc: Higher values require speech-like audio to stand out more clearly above the rolling baseline.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_window_desc: How many recent chunks are considered when detecting sustained audio anomalies.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_tab_desc: Lower is stricter. The attempt can auto-submit after fewer focus losses.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_alerts_desc: Auto-submit after this many alerts are logged.
admin_wizard_ctrl_max_score_desc: Auto-submit after the weighted violation score crosses this number.
admin_wizard_ctrl_consec_frames_desc: Fallback consecutive frame count shared by sustained detectors.
admin_wizard_ctrl_frame_interval_desc: Higher saves bandwidth. Lower gives denser monitoring.
admin_wizard_ctrl_audio_chunk_desc: Higher sends fewer but larger audio chunks.
admin_wizard_ctrl_screenshot_desc: Only used when screen recording is enabled.
admin_wizard_alert_fullscreen_exit_desc: Learner exits fullscreen during the attempt.
admin_wizard_alert_tab_switch_desc: Browser loses focus because the learner switched tabs or apps.
admin_wizard_alert_focus_loss_desc: The test window loses focus or becomes hidden.
admin_wizard_alert_camera_covered_desc: The webcam feed is blocked or too dark.
admin_wizard_alert_no_face_desc: The learner moves out of frame for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_multiple_faces_desc: More than one face appears in the camera view.
admin_wizard_alert_face_mismatch_desc: Live face does not match the verified identity sample.
admin_wizard_alert_loud_audio_desc: Sudden loud noise or speech is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_audio_anomaly_desc: Repeated suspicious audio activity is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_forbidden_obj_desc: Phone, book, or other forbidden object is detected.
admin_wizard_alert_eye_movement_desc: Gaze deviates away from the screen for too long.
admin_wizard_alert_head_pose_desc: The learner turns away or changes head pose suspiciously.
admin_wizard_alert_mouth_movement_desc: Talking or sustained mouth movement is detected.
admin_wizard_action_flag_helper: Creates a proctoring escalation event for admins to review later.
admin_wizard_action_warn_helper: Shows a live warning to the learner and keeps the exam running.
admin_wizard_action_submit_helper: Immediately submits the exam when the rule threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_val_course_title_required: Enter a course title before creating one.
admin_wizard_val_course_create_failed: Failed to create the course. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_setup_partial: Some setup data failed to load. The wizard is still usable with the data that is available.
admin_wizard_val_setup_failed: Failed to load setup data. Retry the page to continue.
admin_wizard_val_code_length: External code / ID must be between 6 and 12 characters.
admin_wizard_val_select_module: Select or create a module before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_generator_count: Please set a total question count for the generator.
admin_wizard_val_generator_mix: Generator difficulty mix must total exactly 100%.
admin_wizard_val_time_limit: Provide a valid time limit or enable unlimited time.
admin_wizard_val_passing_score: Passing score must be between 0 and 100.
admin_wizard_val_max_attempts: Max attempts must be at least 1.
admin_wizard_val_neg_marking: Negative marking must be zero or higher.
admin_wizard_val_cert_title: Enter a certificate title or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_cert_signer: Enter a certificate signer or disable certificates.
admin_wizard_val_restricted_schedule: Restricted assignments require a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_save_assignments: Save learner assignment changes before continuing.
admin_wizard_val_add_question: Add at least one question before publishing.
admin_wizard_val_locked: Published and archived tests must be edited from Manage Tests.
admin_wizard_val_module_failed: Could not create module. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_save_failed: Tidak dapat menyimpan. Silakan periksa kolom yang diperlukan dan coba lagi.
admin_wizard_val_pool_empty: This pool has no questions yet. Open the pool and add questions before seeding this test.
admin_wizard_val_pool_seed_failed: Failed to seed questions from pool.
admin_wizard_val_ai_topic_required: Enter a topic for AI generation.
admin_wizard_val_schedule_required: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_val_assign_failed: Failed to assign sessions. Please try again.
admin_wizard_val_publish_failed: Could not save. Please add questions and try again.
admin_wizard_val_autosave_failed: Autosave failed. Check your connection and try again.
admin_wizard_val_create_test_failed: Could not create the test yet. Please check required fields and try again.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners_match: None of the pasted learners matched the current learner list.
admin_wizard_val_paste_first: Paste learner IDs, emails, or user IDs first.
admin_wizard_val_no_learners: There are no learners available to assign yet.
admin_wizard_val_no_search_match: No learners match the current search.
admin_wizard_card_questions_needed: Questions still need to be added
admin_wizard_review_add_first: Add at least one question first
admin_wizard_review_next_phase_desc: Assign learners and schedule access in Step 7
admin_wizard_description_placeholder: Describe the test purpose, scope, and any special instructions...
admin_wizard_no_courses_hint: No courses yet. Create one here and the wizard will keep going.
admin_wizard_no_modules_hint: No modules in this course. The wizard will create Module 1 automatically.
admin_wizard_create_course_hint: This creates a draft course and its first module without leaving the wizard.
admin_wizard_course_desc_placeholder: Optional description for the training course...
admin_wizard_method_manual_desc: Pick questions from pools or create them manually. Define exactly which questions appear in each test version.
admin_wizard_method_generator_desc: Let the system automatically select questions based on your criteria. Creates unique test versions per candidate.
admin_wizard_ai_hint: Enter a topic and let the model draft questions, then we save them into this test.
admin_wizard_mix_hint: Totals can exceed or fall below 100. They are normalized during generation.
admin_wizard_categories_hint: Leave empty to allow all categories.
admin_wizard_pools_hint: If none selected, generator can draw from any pool.
admin_wizard_prevent_reuse: Prevent reusing same question across versions
admin_wizard_proctoring_intro: This is the dedicated proctoring phase. Configure delivery rules, AI monitoring, special accommodations, and live candidate controls here before you publish.
admin_wizard_escalate_hint: Choose which alert matters, how many repeats are allowed, what severity gets logged, and what the exam should do when the threshold is reached.
admin_wizard_no_rules: No custom alert rules yet. The global auto-submit thresholds still apply until you add a rule here.
admin_wizard_trigger_hint: Count of matching alerts before this rule fires.
admin_wizard_severity_hint: Severity stored on the escalation event for review and reporting.
admin_wizard_message_placeholder: Optional custom message shown when this rule fires
admin_wizard_enable_above: Enable it above or the rule will never fire.
admin_wizard_questions_intro: Add questions directly or seed from a question pool.
admin_wizard_pool_available: question(s) available in this pool for seeding.
admin_wizard_pool_empty_hint: This pool is empty. Open Question Pools and add questions before seeding.
admin_wizard_creating_test: Creating the test so you can add questions...
admin_wizard_hang_tight: Hang tight while we create the test so you can start adding questions right away.
admin_wizard_passing_hint_suffix: % on the entire test to pass.
admin_wizard_enable_neg_marking: Enable negative marking for wrong answers
admin_wizard_show_final_score: Show final score to candidate after submission
admin_wizard_conduct_hint: These map to runtime enforcement: fullscreen prompts, visibility/tab pings, optional screen grabs, and clipboard locking.
admin_wizard_cert_after_review: Learners can download the certificate only after an admin or instructor approves it from Attempt Analysis.
admin_wizard_cert_positive_proctoring: Medium and high proctoring alerts will block certificate download.
admin_wizard_cert_after_pass: The certificate becomes available as soon as the learner passes.
admin_wizard_sessions_intro: Assign this test to learners with a scheduled date and time.
admin_wizard_save_first: Save the test first (go back and advance through steps).
admin_wizard_restricted_warning: Restricted access requires a scheduled date and time before assignments can be saved.
admin_wizard_save_warning: Save assignments to persist the current learner selection before continuing.
admin_wizard_assigned_preselected: Existing assigned learners are preselected. Save assignments to update their access mode or scheduled time.
admin_wizard_bulk_hint: Paste learner IDs, emails, or internal IDs separated by commas or new lines.
admin_wizard_save_intro: Choose the initial status for this test. You can change it later from the Manage Tests page.
admin_wizard_publish_warning: Drafts can be saved without questions. Publishing still requires at least one question.
